name: Marzipan (German Christmas Candy)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the almond paste into chunks in a large bowl.
2. Add the egg whites, 2 tablespoons amaretto, and 4 teaspoons almond extract to the almond paste. Mix well until combined.
3. Gradually add powdered sugar (a small amount at a time) to stiffen the mixture. Continue mixing until stiff.
4. Stir in additional almond extract, amaretto, sugar, and cornstarch until the dough reaches your desired consistency.
5. Chill the dough overnight.
6. Roll into balls once chilled.
7. Melt chocolates over a double boiler (or in the microwave).
8. Dip the marzipan balls into the melted chocolate.
9. Chill in the refrigerator.
Grandpa said that this was the same candy he had as a child in Germany.
